title: [Feature]: How to AND combine filters with "podman image prune"?
body:
### Feature request description

Hello, currently, all filters are OR combined. I want to remove all images with two exact labels. Is there any workaround for this?

### Suggest potential solution

_No response_

### Have you considered any alternatives?

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
The main issue is syntax. We'd have to invent a new CLI syntax to indicate that multiple filters are AND instead of OR.
Depending on the logic [De Morgan's laws](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/De_Morgan's_laws) may be applicable.
As of Podman 5.2.2, this is the default behavior, so I think this issue can be closed. I'm not sure what exact version this behavior changed in, but it was somewhere between 4.4.1 and 5.2.2.
